case_title: CALVIN J WONG VS. MUOI HUYNH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, CALVIN J DBA (SMART CHIROPRACTIC) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUYNH, MUOI $3,562.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,647.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,562.00 FILED BY WONG, CALVIN J DBA (SMART CHIROPRACTIC) AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MUOI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JUL-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, MUOI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JENNY DUONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
